case_title: PHILADELPHIA INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY VS. SALLY WINTON et al

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR JAN-25-2010. DEC-24-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR SIDNEY R. SHERAY APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION FEB-08-2010 THROUGH MAY-09-2010.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT WINTON, SALLY
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-01-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUBROGATION/INSURANCE, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILADELPHIA INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT WINTON, SALLY DOES 1 TO 25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-24-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-26-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-09-2009
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-01-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR UNABLE TO SERVE. THE JUN-01-2010 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT DECLARATION OF DILIGENCE, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILADELPHIA INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED SEP-18-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WINTON, SALLY
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PHILADELPHIA INDEMNITY INSURANCE COMPANY JURY DEMANDED
ARBITRATOR JEROME MARCUS GARCHIK APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION JAN-25-2010 THROUGH APR-25-2010.
